title: Terminal
description: b1.7.3 StationAPI library adding some utilities for mod developers
body:
# Terminal
Library mod for b1.7.3, built on top of [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi).

## Features
* Capability API
* Attachments API
* Item Storage API (Think `IItemHandler`)

## Documentation
Stuff is currently documented in Javadoc.

[Check out the repo if you want to use this in your mod.](https://git.sr.ht/~zekromaster/terminal)
